  • Constructor Details

    • CSLMqttMessage

      public CSLMqttMessage()
      Create an empty CSLMqttMessage.

  • Method Details

    • message

      public static CSLMqttMessage message(String message)
      Create an MQTT message with a specified message string.
      Parameters:
      message - The message String to fill the new CSLMqttMessage with.
      Returns:
      A new CSLMqttMessage with the specified message String.

    • error

      public static CSLMqttMessage error(CSLMqttMessage.Error error)
      Create an MQTT message with a specified error.
      Parameters:
      error - The message CSLMqttMessage.Error to fill the new CSLMqttMessage with.
      Returns:
      A new CSLMqttMessage with the specified CSLMqttMessage.Error.

    • error

      public static CSLMqttMessage error(CSLMqttMessage.Error error, String message)
      Create an MQTT message with a specified error and error message.
      Parameters:
      error - The message CSLMqttMessage.Error to fill the new CSLMqttMessage with.
      message - The message's error message.
      Returns:
      A new CSLMqttMessage with the specified CSLMqttMessage.Error and error message.

    • parse

      public static CSLMqttMessage parse(Json message)
      Parse a message as received through MQTT.
      Parameters:
      message - The message to parse, in Json format.
      Returns:
      The read created CSLMqttMessage.

    • parse

      public static CSLMqttMessage parse(String message)
      Parse a message as received through MQTT.
      Parameters:
      message - The message to parse, in a String with JSON format.
      Returns:
      The read created CSLMqttMessage.

    • setMessage

      public CSLMqttMessage setMessage(String message)
      Set the result message.
      Parameters:
      message - The String to overwrite the message with.
      Returns:
      this.

    • setError

      public CSLMqttMessage setError(CSLMqttMessage.Error error)
      Set the error code.
      Parameters:
      error - The CSLMqttMessage.Error to overwrite the error code with.
      Returns:
      this.

    • setErrorMessage

      public CSLMqttMessage setErrorMessage(String errorMsg)
      Set the error message.
      Parameters:
      errorMsg - The String to overwrite the error message with.
      Returns:
      this.

    • isError

      public boolean isError()
      Check if the message refers to an error, that is the error code corresponds to an actual error.
      Returns:
      true if the CSLMqttMessage refers to an actual error, false otherwise.

    • getResults

      public String getResults()
      Get the result message.
      Returns:
      The result message.

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Create a String suitable for sending through MQTT, in the correct format to be interpreted by other CSL components.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      A String containing a well-formed JSON.
